# DiffPal

> DiffPal is open-source AI pull request review that runs in your CI, lets teams bring their own provider or ACP-compatible agent, and publishes consistent findings, summaries, artifacts, and merge gates across supported code hosts.

## Start Here

- [Home](/): Product overview and core outcomes.
- [Docs](/docs): Main documentation index.
- [GitHub Quickstart](/github-quickstart): Fastest path to a first DiffPal review.
- [Getting Started](/getting-started): Choose a code host, provider, and feedback mode.

## Core Concepts

- [How DiffPal Works](/how-diffpal-works): Review workflow and system boundaries.
- [Review Lifecycle](/review-lifecycle): Stages from scope resolution through publishing and gates.
- [Providers And Agents](/providers-and-agents): Provider, agent, CI, and code host responsibilities.
- [Findings, Feedback, And Gates](/findings-feedback-and-gates): Finding taxonomy, publish surfaces, and blocking policy.
- [Comparison Guide](/comparison): When DiffPal fits compared with hosted reviewers and other tools.
- [Glossary](/glossary): Definitions for DiffPal terms.

## Integrations

- [Integrations](/integrations): Shared CI and code host setup guidance.
- [GitHub Actions](/github-actions): Run DiffPal in GitHub Actions.
- [GitLab CI](/gitlab-ci): Run DiffPal in GitLab merge request pipelines.
- [Azure Pipelines](/azure-pipelines): Run DiffPal in Azure Pipelines pull request validation.
- [Custom CI/CD](/custom-ci): Run DiffPal outside the native host wrappers.

## Providers

- [Providers](/providers): Choose and configure a review provider.
- [Codex Provider](/codex): Use Codex through the default onboarding path.
- [Copilot Provider](/copilot): Use Copilot with a supported token in CI.
- [OpenCode Provider](/opencode): Use OpenCode as an ACP provider.
- [Custom ACP-Compatible CLI](/custom-acp): Connect another ACP stdio server.

## Reference

- [Configuration Reference](/configuration): DiffPal config file shape and environment overrides.
- [CLI Reference](/cli): Commands, flags, and installation paths.
- [Artifacts Reference](/artifacts): Files written by DiffPal review commands.
- [Findings Schema](/findings-schema): Machine-readable findings bundle contract.
- [Support Matrix](/support-matrix): Supported platforms, providers, and outputs.
- [Exit Behavior](/exit-behavior): Process exit codes and merge gate behavior.
- [Versioning](/versioning): CLI, config, artifact, and wrapper compatibility policy.

## Help

- [Troubleshooting](/troubleshooting): Fix common setup, auth, publishing, and review failures.
- [FAQ](/faq): Short answers for product, provider, CI, and artifact questions.
- [Security Controls](/security): Trust boundaries, credentials, and artifact handling.
- [Secrets And Fork Pull Requests](/secrets-and-fork-prs): Safe patterns for secret-backed review.

## Optional

- [DiffPal GitHub Repository](https://github.com/diffpal/diffpal): Source code, issues, and releases.
- [Examples Gallery](https://github.com/diffpal/diffpal/blob/main/examples/README.md): Copy-paste configs and CI files.
- [Changelog](https://github.com/diffpal/diffpal/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md): Release history.
